title: Québec regulated-domain RAG benchmark opportunity
why_it_matters: A Québec-specific regulated-domain benchmark can become a high-value niche for French compliance AI, insurance/legal RAG, and public-service modernization.
actionable_opportunity: Prototype Ω-QC-RegTech-OAK as a RAG evaluator for Québec regulated documents with context-distraction tests and expert-like answer scoring.

oak_check.risk: The benchmark and performance numbers mentioned in the chat briefing require source verification before use.
oak_check.limit: This is a regulated-domain evaluation opportunity, not legal advice or a deployment-ready compliance product.
oak_check.falsification_route: Verify the benchmark source, reproduce a small subset, and test whether RAG improves or distracts across models.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Do not deploy RAG in regulated domains without source-grounding, context-distraction checks, and human review.

sources.title: Source verification required: Québec regulated-domain RAG benchmark mentioned in chat briefing

next_action: Verify the benchmark source and create a small Québec RAG OAKBench issue if the source is credible.
business_funding_signal: Potential niche for Québec/Canada regulated AI compliance services, benchmarks, and public-sector modernization.
